title: Schedule penetration test within audit window
description: Previous pen test (Apr 22–May 2, 2024) ran BEFORE the audit period started. Must schedule this year's test to fall inside the audit window.

title: Complete annual Governance / IS Policy review
description: Last review was Mar 6, 2024 — before the audit period. Must be completed and documented within the audit window this year.

title: Implement onboarding ticket workflow for new hires
description: Onboarding controls (CC1.1, CC1.4, CC2.2, CC6.2, C1.1) were untested because no hires occurred during review period. Ensure every hire/contractor generates a documented ticket: signed handbook, signed policies, background check, access provisioned within 1 week.

title: Implement termination checklist workflow
description: Offboarding controls (CC6.2, C1.2) were untested. Every termination must produce a completed checklist: IT ticket for access revocation, HR notification, physical access removed within defined timeframe.

title: Ensure all changes are logged in ticket system
description: CC8.1 was untested because no system changes were recorded. All infrastructure, code, and config changes must be submitted via Change Request form and tracked in ticket system with management approval.

title: Require all employees to sign current policies
description: All staff must sign the full policy pack at the start of the audit period and whenever policies are updated. Use the portal's Sign workflow to capture signatures.

title: Complete annual risk assessment
description: Document vulnerabilities, threats, fraud risk, vendor cloud risks. Rate all risks using risk evaluation process. Update risk register with mitigation strategies. Required for CC3.1–CC3.4.

title: Complete annual user access role review
description: Review all user access roles and privileges. Management must approve or update. Document the review. Required for CC6.3.

title: Review and test BCDR plan
description: Review, revise, and test Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery plan annually. Document test results. Required for CC9.1.

title: Review asset / system inventory
description: Confirm all physical devices, virtual devices, software, data flows, external systems, and organizational roles are listed and current. Required for CC3.2.

title: Review network diagram with management
description: Engineering team must update and management must review and approve the network diagram annually. Required for C1.1.

title: Review AWS SOC 2 report and all vendor SOC 2 reports
description: Management must review AWS annual SOC 2 report and any other key vendor reports to confirm outsourced controls are appropriately designed and operating effectively. Required for CC9.2.

title: Complete annual performance reviews for all employees
description: Managers must complete performance reviews to ensure job roles and control responsibilities are being performed. Required for CC1.5.

title: Review all vendor contracts for compliance requirements
description: Ensure all vendor contracts include: scope of services, roles & responsibilities, compliance requirements, and service levels. Required for CC9.2.

title: Q2 2026 — Security awareness training (all staff)
description: All employees and contractors must complete security awareness training quarterly. Collect and retain completion records as audit evidence.

title: Q2 2026 — Internal control self-evaluation
description: Control owners perform quarterly self-evaluation of control effectiveness. Management reviews results. Document findings and any management actions. Required for CC4.1 and CC4.2.

title: Q2 2026 — Management operations review
description: Conduct and document quarterly internal control review to ensure controls are functioning as expected. Review commitments and operational objectives. Required for CC3.1.

title: Q2 2026 — Update risk register
description: Review and update risk register with any new threats, vulnerabilities, or changes to risk ratings. Document mitigation status for existing risks.

title: April 2026 — Network vulnerability scans (internal + external)
description: Run and save monthly internal and external network vulnerability scan reports. Review critical findings and assign mitigation actions. Required for CC7.1.

title: April 2026 — Save monitoring dashboard screenshots
description: Capture and retain screenshots of capacity monitoring, security event monitoring, latency, and network performance dashboards. Required for CC4.1 and CC7.2.

title: April 2026 — Review and close open vulnerability findings
description: Review assessment reports, confirm critical items have assigned owners, and track all items to resolution. Required for CC7.1.
